description: A case manager for a patient support program receives a request to enroll a new patient and verify their benefits for a specialty drug.

nodes.task_description: Receive and log the completed enrollment form from the patient's physician.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new patient case and enters their demographic and insurance information.

nodes.task_description: Perform a benefits verification check with the patient's insurance provider.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent uses a benefits verification tool and finds the drug is covered but requires prior authorization.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the prior authorization process on behalf of the physician's office.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits the required clinical information to the insurance company.

nodes.task_description: Inform the patient and physician that the enrollment is pending prior authorization approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a status update notification to the patient and physician.
